summary: Completed frontend testing of Phase 3 management pages. Successfully tested Package Management page with full functionality. Identified session management issues preventing complete testing of other management pages.

integration_issues.issue: Authentication session not persisting properly across page navigation
Management pages redirect to login even with valid admin credentials

passed_tests: ✅ Admin login with credentials admin@test.com / testpassword123
✅ Package Management displays stats cards (Total, Active, Draft, Featured)
✅ Package Management shows filter dropdowns (Status, Categories)
✅ Package Management shows empty state message correctly
✅ Navigation sidebar shows management links when logged in as admin
✅ Services submenu expands and shows 'Manage Packages' link
✅ Management dropdown menu is present in sidebar
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix session management and authentication persistence issues. The frontend authentication context may not be properly storing/retrieving tokens, causing redirects to login page when navigating to protected management routes. Backend authentication API is working correctly.

success_percentage.frontend: 30% (1 of 4 management pages fully tested due to session issues)
